Photo by Sydney University Formula Racing Society on March 03, 2026. May be an image of racing vehicles, poster and text that says "doin οn Fantasy league 3x 1 ጀኒፈ USU సుಮార్తి FORMULA RACING · 099000000060680 SOCETY".

It was lovely seeing you all at the Chinese Grand Prix Watch Party!!!! 🥳🥳

The historic race where Kimi Antonelli became the 2nd youngest race winner EVER and where Lewis Hamilton finally got his 1st podium with Ferrari was made even more unforgettable with everyone's energy! 🏆🍾

Let's keep the fun going by attending the other events we have planned this year, including the watch party for the Japanese Grand Prix... keep an eye out for more info 👀

Thank you to everyone who joined us at the watch party to witness the exciting season opener, the Aus GP!!!! 🎉🎉🎉 
Watching the George Russell v Leclerc battle, the many DNFs and the loud cheers and enthusiasm made it much more enjoyable. 🏎🙌 

We can’t wait to see you at future events, and luckily, we won't have to wait long! The Chinese Grand Prix Watch Party is coming up this weekend, and we still have tickets available. So come join us and replicate the exhilaration! 🏁

Ticket link in bio 🔗

#usu #f1 #watchparty #unievents #motorsport

Thank you everyone who came out to our trivia night! Your competitiveness and passion made this an unforgettable event. 🎉🎉🎉
Congratulations to the winners and we hope you enjoyed and made some wonderful connections.

We hope to see you all at our future events, the next being our Australian Grand Prix Watch Party! Be sure to check our bio for tickets 🏁🏁

Hey, all new and continuing Formsoc members! 👋🏼

Thank you to everyone who came by to our stall and made this another successful welcome fest! It was so nice meeting you all and discussing all things F1. It was great seeing everyone's hot takes and talking about all our upcoming events. 🎉🏁

Speaking of which, don't forget that tickets for both our trivia night and our hyperkarting events are in our bio. 🔗 

Don't forget to join the society through USU to be able to attend. And make sure to keep following our instagram for more updates and future events coming up.

#usuwelcomefest #f1 #unievents #usu #usyd
